title: Operations
note: Primary company operations page describing Devon as an independent energy company producing oil and natural gas across core U.S. operating areas.

title: Devon Energy Corporation 2025 Form 10-K
note: Annual filing source for Devon's 2025 operating cash flow, earnings, oil production, liquidity, and business-risk context.

title: Devon Energy (DVN) - Market capitalization
note: Market-cap source used for the May 2026 public-company valuation snapshot.

title: Devon Energy (DVN) Stock Price & Overview
note: Market-data source for trailing P/E ratio, market cap cross-check, revenue, net income, and company profile.

title: System Overview
note: Documents the open-source hardware and software stack for local energy monitoring and EmonCMS data logging and visualization.

title: Welcome to the OpenEnergyMonitor guide
note: Documentation hub for OpenEnergyMonitor guides, including electricity and heat-pump monitoring use cases.

title: OpenEnergyMonitor GitHub organization
note: Repository organization for OpenEnergyMonitor's open-source energy monitoring tools.

title: Microgrid Controller Initiatives in the Department of Energy
note: Technical analysis explaining the role of microgrid controllers in managing distributed energy resources, storage, and responsive demand.

title: Performance Evaluation of an Advanced Distributed Energy Resource Management Algorithm
note: Source for distributed energy resource management and hardware-in-the-loop testing of DER dispatch algorithms.

title: Power Cube
note: Open-hardware documentation for a modular power unit in the Global Village Construction Set, used as an ambitious local-machine alternative primitive.

title: Steam Engine
note: Open Source Ecology documentation for a modular open-source steam engine concept that could convert local heat sources into mechanical or electrical power.
